message:
chore(beads): close j7hqe after verification of fd190dbe

j7hqe (pages analytics + wizard fsync gap) fix was landed in commit
fd190dbe. Post-verification: cargo test --test pages_pipeline_e2e
--test e2e_pages --test pages_wizard on the fresh working tree all
green (67+57+76=200 pass, 0 fail). The new unit tests —
`pages::tests::write_file_durably_writes_bytes_and_fsyncs` and
`pages::tests::write_file_durably_surfaces_parent_fsync_error` —
exercise both the happy path and the negative-side parent-fsync
assertion that mirrors bead ...-92o31's sync_tree regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
